ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_number" TEXT /* Vehicle number (e.g., KCD 683L) */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver assigned to the vehicle */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the vehicle in liters */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., truck, tanker) */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle (e.g., Scania, Mercedes) */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle (e.g., Scania P380, Mercedes-Benz Actros) */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date of license expiration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "depots" (
  "depot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each depot */,
  "depot_name" TEXT /* Name of the depot */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the depot */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Manager in charge of the depot */,
  "depot_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the depot in liters */,
  "depot_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the depot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("depot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type (e.g., AGO, LUBES) */,
  "fuel_density" REAL /* Density of the fuel type in kg/liter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product (e.g., VIVO, TOTAL) */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "depot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the depot where the inventory is located */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel type in inventory */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of fuel in inventory */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of last inventory update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_depot_id FOREIGN KEY ("depot_id") REFERENCES depots ("depot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, dispatcher, driver) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver being assigned */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of assignment */,
  "assignment_end_date" TEXT /* Date of assignment end */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_assignments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_assignments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "depot_inventory_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "depot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the depot where the inventory is located */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel type in inventory */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of fuel in inventory */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date of inventory level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_depot_inventory_history_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_depot_inventory_history_depot_id FOREIGN KEY ("depot_id") REFERENCES depots ("depot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery being noted */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date of note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id")
)
